name: Brown Rice Salad with Apples & Walnuts
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Brown or long grain rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Place rice in a medium saucepan along with water, oil, and salt. Cover and bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat to simmer and cook for 45 minutes or until the rice is tender and all the water has been absorbed.
3. Meanwhile, combine walnuts, celery, scallions, raisins, apples, and lemon rind in a large bowl.
4. In a jar with a tight-fitting lid, combine lemon juice, garlic, salt, pepper, and olive oil and shake well.
5. Pour half of this dressing over the fruit mixture and toss well.
6. Let rice cool until just warm.
7. Combine rice with the fruit mixture and pour on the remaining dressing.
8. Let sit at least 1 hour before serving at room temperature, on a bed of lettuce if desired.
